title: Spartan Weaponry: Gobber
description: Addon mod for Spartan Weaponry that adds compatibility with Gobber.
body:
**
Adds new [Gobber](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gobber) themed weapons and traits to [Spartan Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry).
**
### Supported materials: - **Gobber** - **Nether Gobber** - Wither Skeleton Decapitate - Instantly kills Wither Skeletons, dropping their skull - Fireproof - Will not be destroyed when dropped in fire or lava - **End Gobber** - Unbreakable - Unbreakable when crafted, dependent on Gobber config ###
Planned updates: - Support 1.19.2 - Support 1.18.2 - Fix any [bugs](https://github.com/KreloX/SpartanGobber/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3Abug)
**
Get yourself a server with 15% off the first month at Kinetic Hosting with code KRELOX
